files_modified.detail: Append DEFAULT_CAP_MULTIPLIER-free (formula-based) new section: combine_and_cap(selected, expansions, *, k=DEFAULT_K) -> list[int]. No changes to any existing line from 4.4.1/4.4.2.

files_created.detail: New test module per issue's exact test-spec file name; oversized candidate+expansion fixture, assert final length == min(available, k+2k); plus dedup and ordering/priority tests.

files_not_touched: docs/LLD/query-agent.md (no doc-formula ambiguity to resolve; existing text sufficient)

downstream_consumers.note: No wiring/pipeline.py exists yet in agents/query/ (confirmed via LLD: 'Status: scaffold only'). 4.4.4 (integration test, explicitly out of scope for this dispatch) is the next consumer of combine_and_cap's output shape.

risk_of_regression: low — pure additive function; no existing symbol renamed, no existing function signature changed, no existing import touched.
backward_compatibility: full — select_top_k, TopicCandidate, DEFAULT_K, SearchCandidatesFn (4.4.1) and is_insufficient_alone, expand_insufficient_topics, GraphNeighbor, GraphNeighborsFn, ExpansionResult, DEFAULT_INSUFFICIENCY_RATIO, DEFAULT_EXPANSION_HOPS (4.4.2) remain byte-for-byte unchanged.
